two_mode_hamiltonian_diagonal.detail: All basis-state energies match analytic formula within 1e-3 rad/s

manifold_transition_frequency.detail: omega_ge(n) = chi*n verified for n=0..4 (chi=-2.84 MHz)

chi_sign_negative_lowers_freq.detail: chi=-2.84 MHz: freq(n=0)=0.0000 MHz, freq(n=1)=-2.8400 MHz, freq(n=5)=-14.2000 MHz

chi_sign_positive_raises_freq.detail: chi=+2.84 MHz: freq(n=0)=0.0000 MHz, freq(n=1)=2.8400 MHz

three_mode_chi_s_shift.detail: chi_s shift: expected=-2.8000 MHz, got=-2.8000 MHz

three_mode_chi_r_shift.detail: chi_r shift: expected=-1.2000 MHz, got=-1.2000 MHz

three_mode_storage_kerr.detail: storage Kerr: expected=-2.00 kHz, got=-2.00 kHz

t1_decay.detail: Excited-state population matches exp(-t/T1) within 5% for T1=10 us

dephasing_t2.detail: Coherence decays as exp(-t/T_phi) within 5% for T_phi=20 us

dephasing_2lev_vs_3lev_consistency.detail: CONVENTION ISSUE: For same T_phi=20 us, 2-level ge dephasing rate = 1/T_phi = 5.00e+04/s, 3-level ge dephasing rate = 1/(4*T_phi) = 1.25e+04/s. Factor of 4x discontinuity when switching from n_tr=2 to n_tr=3.
